name_en: Dior 1:1 counter authentic top-grade imported original embroidered shopping bag Blue Lotus 🪷 Large 42cm ✨
name_cn:
Dior 1:1 counter authentic top-grade imported original embroidered shopping bag Blue Lotus 🪷 Large 42cm ✨
 This Book Tote bag, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. The white style is fully embellished with a multicolor Butterfly Around The World pattern embroidery, highlighting the classic beauty of the series, accented with the text L'envol des papillons dévoile nos désirs aux étoiles, and can hold various daily items. The medium style features a Christian Dior Paris logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or on the shoulder. 8001
Dimensions: 42 x 35 x 18.5cm,📸 exclusive real-life photos 🎞✨
